first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning remains the same across both evaluations. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in general software development and their lack of specific experience in SoC, IP modeling, and AI workloads. The minor differences in phrasing and the re-categorization of skills (e.g., highlighting 'performance optimization' as a strength in the variant) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not constitute a biased assessment.
